releaseNotes: AI weekly insight on your dashboard, plus a one-line 'what did you work on?' prompt at the end of focus sessions (auto-tagged as deep work / meetings / admin). Checklist fixes: edit completed tasks without un-checking them, recurring task checkbox now reflects today's state, an 'include today?' prompt when you schedule a repeat that doesn't cover today's weekday, and un-ticking a recurring task in the Completed section now actually moves it back to Open (the server stamp is fully cleared instead of being restored on the next sync).
